hus ends the 12th Ch. entitled Cancellation of evils at birth in Kalyana Varmas Saravali.
37

Chapter 13
Lunar Yogas
1. SUNAPHA, ANAPHA AND DURUDHURA YOGAS. Excepting the Sun, any other planet in the
2nd from the Moon causes Sunapha Yoga, in the 12th Anapha Yoga and in both the 2nd and
the 12th Durudhura Yoga.
2. KEMADRUMA YOGA. Kemadruma Yoga is formed, if at least one of the said three Yogas (viz.
Sunapha, Anapha and Durudhura Yogas) is not present, or, if the Moons Angles are devoid
of planets, or, if she is un-aspected by all the planets. Such Yoga causes extreme difficulties.
3. DIFFERENT PERMUTATIONS. By all possible permutations and transmutations, one can see
30 kinds of Sunapha Yoga, 30 kinds of Anapha Yoga and 180 kinds of Durudhura Yoga.
4. EFFECTS OF SUNAPHA YOGA. One born with Sunapha Yoga will be wealthy, will have self-
made prowess (or will reach an exalted position of his own efforts), be very virtuous, be
